author: tersec
content:
Meanwhile, actual `nimbus-erigon-1` is constantly optimistic because
```
[INFO] [06-06|07:18:12.625] [NewPayload] Handling new payload        height=11850 hash=0xfdd99eb055ef6e7fa1055544bfe9d45121ca177fdd74607563ddaf2433e5d4af
[INFO] [06-06|07:18:12.793] [sync] limited big jump                  from=6137 to=11850 amount=5000 padding=2
[WARN] [06-06|07:18:12.813] no unwindable block found from changesets, falling back to latest with commitment block=6137 err=nil
[WARN] [06-06|07:18:12.813] reorg target below minimum unwindable block unwindTarget=6133 minUnwindableBlock=6137
[WARN] [06-06|07:18:12.814] [rpc] served                             conn=[2a01:4f8:c17:ed74::d]:43140 method=engine_forkchoiceUpdatedV4 reqid=579 err="Too deep reorg"
```

author: taratorio
content: yea, ill push a fix in a bit, been working on it

author: tersec
content: why is Nimbus triggering this but other CLs don't seem to be?

author: taratorio
content:
it looks reorg+timing related to me. so nothing wrong being done by nimbus in particular. for your reference, the scenario where we stalled was:
- during our initial sync to tip (we weren't there yet) nimbus gave us an FCU to sync up to block `6137` but the FCU was for a now orphaned head [0x137faa67d6e4a99dd5b9667a6cfc77bf24390f1b54b4be5d0126d84437804e6b](https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/0x7b055dec7b7f76c3d833e6ac670e59da7086fb3163c8fc1d879a6543ec56b902) at slot `6262` built by Ethrex (likely because they got rebooted by watchtower as <@755590043632140352> mentioned)
- we synced up to it (the tip was ~12m old at the time, so around 60 blocks old)
- since then there have been canonical NewPayloads that connect to that last FCU's chain but at block `6133` requiring us to do a 4 block re-org
- it uncovered a bug we have in our initial sync and reorg logic that prevents us from being able to do this reorg, so we're stuck forever

author: taratorio
content: just pushed some fixes, <@&1416139337179074590> if anyone is around could you pls re-sync nimbus<>erigon and also teku<>erigon?
